data.title: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Apple, Nike, US Steel — And The Markets Ride Out Ongoing Volatility
data.description: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

data.title: RFK Jr Asks If Taxpayer-Funded Healthcare Should Be Accessible To People Smoking 'Three Packs A Day'
data.description: RFK Jr. questions if society should cover healthcare costs for unhealthy habits, sparking debate. Experts worry about limiting access based on behavior.

data.title: Trump Tariff Wars: China's New Rule To Exempt Nvidia, Qualcomm And Others From Levies, But These Chip Companies Will Be Hit With 125% Tariffs
data.description: China's new chip origin rule spares U.S. designers like Nvidia, AMD, and Qualcomm from 125% tariffs by exempting Taiwan-fabricated chips, while penalizing U.S.-based manufacturers like Intel, GlobalFoundries, and Texas Instruments, reshaping the global semiconductor supply chain.

data.title: Kevin O'Leary Says Xi Jinping Is 'Playing With Fire:' 'If This Gamble Doesn't Pay Off…'
data.description: Kevin O'Leary criticizes Trump's tariff strategy against China, citing potential consequences for markets and his political standing.

data.title: Ex-OpenAI Staffers Support Elon Musk's Legal Battle Against Sam Altman-Led AI Startup's For-Profit Shift
data.description: 12 ex-employees of OpenAI support Elon Musk in his legal battle against the company's transition to for-profit.
